The '''16th Escort Force''' was a unit of the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Starfleet]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==History==
Under the command of [[Commodore/Legends|Commodore]] [[Soleric]], the 16th was tasked with the protection of commercial starships traveling between the [[Induparan Crown Worlds]] in the [[Ado sector/Legends|Ado sector]]. As [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance-funded]] [[Privateer/Legends|privateers]] of ''[[Free Lance]]'' began to raid the valuable merchant vessels plying the Induparan spacelanes, the 16th was spread thin. Whether by Soleric's lack of command or by the tenacity of [[Urias Xhaxin]], the 16th was unable to protect their charges and maintain order in the sector.

==Behind the scenes==
While the exact composition of the force is unknown it was described as being a relatively small flotilla. Both the name and the rank of its commanding officer point to the 16th being no less than a system force shaped as Force Escort, but the description of the 16th as small and the highly specific area of protection could lead to a variety of conclusions, in any combination: the 16th was a modified system force, the commerce of the region was important enough to warrant a Commodore's supervision, or the name was a misnomer.
